title: Lumen Scanner Hybrid Upload Payload
description: The structured findings JSON sent by `lumen scan --hybrid` to lumen-api /api/v1/lumen/scanner/ingest. No file content, no PII, no hostnames.

scanner_version.description: Semver of the lumen binary that produced this payload, e.g. 'v0.1.0'.

content_bundle_sha.description: SHA-256 of the rule+NVD bundle used during the scan.

scanned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the scan was run.

findings.description: Per-domain structured probe outputs. Each key is a domain ID.

signature.description: ed25519 signature (hex) over the canonical JSON of the 'findings' field, computed using the per-install key generated on first `lumen consent`.

install_key_fingerprint.description: Hex fingerprint of the public key used to sign this payload. Not the private key — safe to transmit.

metadata.description: Optional non-PII probe metadata (e.g. package counts, OS version).

rule_id.description: YAML rule identifier this hint maps to, e.g. 'NO_MFA_ORG_WIDE'.

value.description: Optional numeric or string value supporting the hint.
